family_rationale: This is the next unprocessed non-sims constraint-ladder document in folder order after GEOMETRY_ADMISSIBILITY_v1.md.
The document is a structured overlay-governance surface for game-theory analogies rather than a kernel math surface or stitched theory note.

Its dominant value is the explicit discipline that permits strategic/game labels only as removable, scoped, non-binding overlays while blocking payoff, equilibrium, rationality, optimization, and prediction drift into the kernel.
No active A2 surfaces were mutated.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve this as the game-theory overlay boundary in which strategic analogies remain explicit, versioned, reversible, and non-authoritative for kernel admissibility or meaning
